skill.name: impeccable
skill.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics. Use when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications, or when any design skill requires project context. Call with 'craft' for shape-then-build, 'teach' for design context setup, or 'extract' to pull reusable components and tokens into the design system.
skill.summary: AI design skill for creating polished, non-generic frontend interfaces with expert typography, color, and interaction design.
skill.author: pbakaus
skill.license: Apache 2.0. Based on Anthropic's frontend-design skill. See NOTICE.md for attribution.

security_audit.summary: All 329 static findings are false positives. The scanner misinterpreted Markdown code fences as shell commands, design terminology as cryptographic patterns, and documentation URLs as network risks. The only real operational risk is a post-update cleanup script that removes deprecated skill files from the filesystem, which is benign and documented to the user before execution. No malicious intent, data exfiltration, or dangerous code execution detected.

low_findings.title: External command execution via cleanup script
low_findings.description: SKILL.md instructs the AI to run a Node.js cleanup script after skill updates. The script deletes deprecated skill directories and updates a lock file. This is a legitimate maintenance operation that runs only once per update, with explicit user notification beforehand. No network access or credential handling involved.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cleanup script is transparent, runs only with user notification, and performs only filesystem operations on known deprecated paths. No injection vector exists.

content.user_title: Build polished frontend interfaces with AI
content.value_statement: AI-generated interfaces often look generic and templated. Impeccable guides the AI through expert design decisions, producing distinctive production-grade frontend code.
actual_capabilities: Guide AI to create distinctive, non-generic frontend interfaces with bold aesthetic directions
Provide expert typography, color, spacing, and interaction design reference material
Gather project-specific design context through structured user questions
Generate production-grade HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with attention to accessibility
Extract reusable design tokens and components into a shared design system
Enforce quality standards through explicit anti-pattern bans and the AI slop test
limitations: Requires user input on brand personality, audience, and use cases before generating designs
Does not replace a human designer for complex brand or visual strategy decisions
Reference material focuses on vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript rather than framework-specific patterns
Design quality depends on the AI model ability to follow nuanced guidelines and make creative choices

use_cases.title: Marketing site redesign
use_cases.description: A startup founder wants their landing page to stand out from the sea of identical SaaS templates. Impeccable guides the AI through a bold aesthetic direction with distinctive typography and color choices.

use_cases.title: Design system bootstrapping
use_cases.description: A developer needs to extract consistent design tokens, components, and patterns from an existing codebase into a reusable design system. The extract mode identifies reusable patterns and formalizes them.

use_cases.title: Accessible form and interaction design
use_cases.description: A product team needs properly designed forms, focus states, loading patterns, and keyboard navigation. Impeccable provides reference material on WCAG compliance, the Popover API, and focus ring design.

prompt_templates.title: Design context setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Run /impeccable teach to gather design context for my project. Scan the codebase first, then ask me the questions you still need answered.
prompt_templates.scenario: First time using Impeccable on a new project

prompt_templates.title: Build a feature from scratch
prompt_templates.prompt: Run /impeccable craft a pricing page for a SaaS product. The target audience is small business owners who value clarity and speed. The brand tone is confident, practical, and no-nonsense.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating a new marketing page section

prompt_templates.title: Extract a design system
prompt_templates.prompt: Run /impeccable extract the shared design tokens and reusable components from my existing component library. Focus on colors, spacing, typography, and button variants.
prompt_templates.scenario: Consolidating inconsistent patterns into a design system

prompt_templates.title: Design with specific constraints
prompt_templates.prompt: Run /impeccable craft a dark-mode dashboard for an observability tool used by SREs. The interface needs to be information-dense but readable, with a muted color palette and strong data visualization hierarchy.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building a technical interface with strict usability requirements

output_examples.input: Create a hero section for a creative agency portfolio with bold typography and asymmetric layout
output_examples.output: A responsive hero section with fluid display typography using clamp(), an asymmetric grid layout with varied spacing, a distinctive font pairing chosen through the font selection procedure, and a clear visual hierarchy that passes the squint test.

output_examples.input: Extract reusable tokens from a page with inconsistent color values
output_examples.output: A cohesive design token system with OKLCH-based primitive colors, tinted neutral scales, semantic color mappings for primary and status colors, and documented guidance on when to use each token.

output_examples.input: Design an accessible contact form with proper validation
output_examples.output: A form with visible labels, validation on blur, descriptive error messages with aria-describedby, proper focus rings using focus-visible, and appropriately sized touch targets for mobile users.

best_practices: Always gather design context from the user before generating any design work. Check existing instructions, then .impeccable.md, then run the teach flow.
Commit to a bold aesthetic direction rather than retreating to safe, generic defaults. Both maximalism and minimalism work when executed with intentionality.
Run the AI slop test on every output: would someone immediately recognize this as AI-generated? If yes, the design needs more distinctive creative choices.
anti_patterns: Using reflex fonts like Inter, Fraunces, Space Grotesk, and Cormorant that create monoculture across AI-generated projects.
Defaulting to cyan-on-dark, purple-to-blue gradients, or glowing accents on dark backgrounds, which are the most recognizable AI design tells.
Using border-left accent stripes on cards, gradient text, and glassmorphism as decoration, which are explicitly banned as AI slop patterns.

faq.question: When should I invoke Impeccable?
faq.answer: Use Impeccable when building web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications. It is not needed for backend code, data processing, or non-visual tasks.

faq.question: What is the difference between craft, teach, and extract modes?
faq.answer: Craft mode builds a feature through a structured design process. Teach mode gathers design context from you for the project. Extract mode pulls reusable components and tokens into a design system.

faq.question: Does Impeccable work with React, Vue, or other frameworks?
faq.answer: The reference material is framework-agnostic and focuses on vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The principles apply to any framework, but the output examples use plain web technologies.

faq.question: How does Impeccable prevent generic AI-looking designs?
faq.answer: It enforces explicit bans on common AI design patterns, provides a font selection procedure that rejects reflex defaults, and includes an AI slop test quality gate for every output.

faq.question: Can Impeccable help with accessibility compliance?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes reference material on WCAG contrast ratios, focus ring design, form accessibility, reduced motion support, keyboard navigation patterns, and touch target sizing.

faq.question: What happens when I update to a new version of Impeccable?
faq.answer: A one-time cleanup script runs to remove deprecated skill files and lock entries. You are notified before it runs, and it only deletes files confirmed to belong to Impeccable.
